zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid van Limburg於大約1090年出生在法國德 艾斯特莫瑟勒利時，她的父親Hendrik I van Limburg31歲，母親Adelheid von Pottenstein34歲。她於大約1107年與Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1146年2月6日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 達豪享年57歲，埋葬在奧地利斯泰爾馬可多易其倫德斯格可洛斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid van Limburg于大约1090年出生在法国德 艾斯特莫瑟勒利时，她的父亲Hendrik I van Limburg31岁，母亲Adelheid von Pottenstein34岁。她于大约1107年与Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1146年2月6日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 達豪享年57岁，埋葬在奥地利斯泰爾馬可多易其倫德斯格可洛斯特。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid van Limburg was born about 1090, in Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, France, her father, Hendrik I van Limburg, was 31 and her mother, Adelheid von Pottenstein, was 34. She married Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg about 1107. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 6 February 1146, in Dachau, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Styria, Austria.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid van Limburg est née environ 1090, à Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, France, son père, Hendrik I van Limburg, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Pottenstein, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg environ 1107. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 février 1146, à Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Styrie, Autriche.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid van Limburg um 1090 in Riche, Moselle, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hendrik I van Limburg 31 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Pottenstein 34. Sie hat um 1107 Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Februar 1146 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Steiermark, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Limburg è nata il circa 1090 nel Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Hendrik I van Limburg, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Pottenstein, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg circa 1107. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 6 febbraio 1146, nel Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Steiermark, Austria.

ja.Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhin: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグ
ja.Dachau, Bavaria, Germany: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ダチャウ
ja.Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Styria, Austr: オーストリアステイエルマークデウトスチランドスバーグクロスター
ja.Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, France: フランスグランド エストモセルリチェ
ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Limburgが約1090年にフランスグランド エストモセルリチェで生まれた時，父Hendrik I van Limburgは31歳，母Adelheid von Pottensteinは34歳であった。約1107年にFriedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1146年2月6日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ダチャウで57歳で死去し，オーストリアステイエルマークデウトスチランドスバーグクロスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Limburg(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 모셀 리체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hendrik I van Limburg(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Pottenstein(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1107년 Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1146년 2월 6일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 다차우에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 스테이마크 데우츠클랜드스버그 클로스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Limburg nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Hendrik I van Limburg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Pottenstein, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg aproximadamente 1107. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1146, em Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Steiermark, Áustria.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid van Limburg родилась около 1090 г. в местности рич, моселл, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Hendrik I van Limburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Pottenstein, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg около 1107 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 февраля 1146 г. в местности ландкрис дачао, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности клостир, деуцчландсбирг, стиирмарк, Австрия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid van Limburg nació aproximadamente 1090, en Riche, Moselle, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Hendrik I van Limburg, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Pottenstein, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Friedrich 'der Streitbare' von Werl-Arnsberg aproximadamente 1107. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1146, en Landkreis Dachau, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Kloster, Deutschlandsberg, Steiermark, Austria.
